metadata.name: demo_vault
metadata.description: Solana PoC public share-mint vault fronted by the confidential batcher

docs: Anchor entrypoint module for the demo vault.

instructions.name: deposit
docs: Deposits `amount` underlying assets and mints shares at the current price
(rounded down). Permissionless.

accounts.name: depositor
docs: Depositor and transfer authority over `depositor_underlying`.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault whose share price the deposit is measured against.

accounts.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint, read for its decimals.

accounts.name: share_mint
docs: Share mint, whose supply is the total shares outstanding.

accounts.name: depositor_underlying
docs: Depositor's underlying token account (source).

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault token account whose balance is the total assets under management.

accounts.name: depositor_shares
docs: Depositor's share token account (destination for minted shares).

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL token program.

instructions.name: harvest
docs: Donates `amount` underlying to the vault without minting shares, raising
the share price for existing holders. Permissionless (demo-only; a real
vault gates this behind a keeper/strategy role).

accounts.name: donor
docs: Donor and transfer authority over `donor_underlying`.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault receiving the donation.

accounts.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint, read for its decimals.

accounts.name: donor_underlying
docs: Donor's underlying token account (source).

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault token account whose balance is increased by the donation.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL token program.

instructions.name: initialize_vault
docs: Creates the vault state account, its PDA-owned share mint, and its
PDA-owned underlying token account. Permissionless; no admin role beyond
this one-time setup.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Rent payer and the account that submits the initialization.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault state account, created here. A fresh keypair signs its own creation.

accounts.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint the vault accepts.

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: signing authority, never deserialized.

accounts.name: share_mint
docs: Share mint created here, with the same decimals as the underlying and the
vault authority PDA as its mint authority.

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault token account created here, owned by the vault authority PDA.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL token program.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for account creation.

instructions.name: withdraw
docs: Burns `shares` and returns underlying assets at the current price
(rounded down). Permissionless.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Share owner and burn authority over `owner_shares`.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault whose share price the withdraw is measured against.

accounts.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint, read for its decimals.

accounts.name: share_mint
docs: Share mint, whose supply is the total shares outstanding.

accounts.name: owner_shares
docs: Owner's share token account (burn source).

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault token account whose balance is the total assets under management.

accounts.name: owner_underlying
docs: Owner's underlying token account (destination for returned assets).

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL token program.

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: ZeroShares
errors.msg: deposit is too small to mint any shares

errors.name: ZeroAssets
errors.msg: redeem is too small to return any assets

errors.name: InsufficientShares
errors.msg: insufficient share balance for this withdraw

errors.name: UnderlyingMintMismatch
errors.msg: underlying mint does not match the vault

errors.name: ShareMintMismatch
errors.msg: share mint does not match the vault

errors.name: VaultTokenAccountMismatch
errors.msg: vault token account does not match the vault

errors.name: OwnerMismatch
errors.msg: token account owner does not match signer

errors.name: MintMismatch
errors.msg: token account mint does not match

types.name: Deposited
docs: Emitted when underlying assets are deposited for freshly minted shares.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: vault
docs: Vault state account.

fields.name: depositor
docs: Depositor and transfer authority.

fields.name: assets
docs: Underlying assets moved into the vault.

fields.name: shares
docs: Shares minted to the depositor.

types.name: Harvested
docs: Emitted when underlying assets are donated to the vault without minting shares.
This is the demo's simulated yield: the donation raises the share price for
every existing holder. A real vault would gate this behind a keeper/strategy
role; here it is permissionless.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: vault
docs: Vault state account.

fields.name: donor
docs: Donor and transfer authority.

fields.name: assets
docs: Underlying assets donated to the vault.

types.name: Vault
docs: Public share-mint vault state.
Deliberately minimal: totals are never mirrored here. Total assets are read
live from the vault token account balance and total shares from the share
mint supply, so a permissionless `harvest` (a plain donation transfer) is
accounted for by construction — the donation just increases the token
account balance, and every share-price read picks it up.

fields.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying token mint the vault accepts.

fields.name: share_mint
docs: Share mint issued 1:1 in decimals with the underlying.

fields.name: vault_token_account
docs: Token account holding the vault's underlying assets, owned by the authority PDA.

fields.name: authority_bump
docs: Bump for the vault authority PDA that owns assets and the share mint.

types.name: VaultInitialized
docs: Emitted when a vault is created.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: vault
docs: Vault state account.

fields.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying token mint the vault accepts.

fields.name: share_mint
docs: Share mint the vault issues.

fields.name: vault_token_account
docs: Token account holding the vault's underlying assets.

fields.name: vault_authority
docs: PDA authority owning the underlying token account and the share mint.

types.name: Withdrawn
docs: Emitted when shares are burned for underlying assets.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: vault
docs: Vault state account.

fields.name: owner
docs: Share owner and burn authority.

fields.name: shares
docs: Shares burned.

fields.name: assets
docs: Underlying assets returned to the owner.
